target: Exhibit J-1 State Addenda — full extraction

California: Venue limitation may not be enforceable
General release does not waive Franchise Investment Law rights
Illinois: Venue/governing law/jury waiver do not override IL Franchise Disclosure Act
Maryland: State law may supersede on termination/renewal
May sue in Maryland for MD Franchise Law claims
Michigan: Termination only for good cause (30-day cure)
Must fairly compensate on non-renewal (if term <5 years)
New York: NY law governs NY Franchise Law causes of action
General release in renewal/transfer may not be enforceable
Washington: Release waiver only effective post-negotiated settlement with counsel
Noncompete void if employee <$100K or contractor <$250K
